---
title: Unix shells
description: |
  [![](img/logo_bash.png){width="1.5em"}](https://www.gnu.org/software/bash/) / &nbsp;[![](img/logo_zsh.svg){width="1.2em"}](https://www.zsh.org/) &nbsp;scripting & command line utilities
title-block-banner: true
---

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Courses</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Getting started with ![](img/logo_bash.png){width="1.3em"} & &nbsp;![](img/logo_zsh.svg){width="1.1em"}](top_intro.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[A course on Bash and Zsh]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

::::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Webinars</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5, 5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Fun tools for the CLI](wb_tools1.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[More tools for the CLI](wb_tools2.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Modern shell utilities](wb_tools3.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Workshops</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, -5, -5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Scripting for beginners](ws_scripting.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
